info.title: Initializing NCompileBench. Version:
info.description:
Run with -verbose flag to see more details during the benchmark
Run with -submit to submit your latest benchmark
Run with -autosubmit to automatically submit your latest benchmark. If used together with -submit, previous benchmark result is submitted
Run with -scores to view the online results without running the benchmark
Run with -nomaxiterations to get even more accurate results. Please view readme for more details
****
Results and help available from: https://www.ncompilebench.io
Created by Mikael Koskinen: https://mikaelkoskinen.net
Source code available from https://github.com/mikoskinen/NCompileBench (MIT)
Based on .NET Performance repository: https://github.com/dotnet/performance by Microsoft (MIT)
Uses BenchmarkDotNet: https://github.com/dotnet/BenchmarkDotNet (MIT)
Compiles source code available from https://github.com/dotnet/roslyn/releases/tag/perf-assets-v1
****
Setting up the benchmark
Starting benchmark in 5 seconds. Please sit tight, this may take up-to 10 minutes
..
No usable version of libssl was found
